name: Food & Beverage
description: Prompt cookbook for food & beverage commercial video — appetite-trigger cinematography (cheese pulls, sauce pours, steam reveals, ASMR sizzle, latte art, cocktail builds). 10-20s, 9:16 or 1:1. Reference-required: a real product / dish photo / packaging / logo must be supplied for any branded item, otherwise generation refuses (no AI-improvised packaging on real products). Texture-first, sound-as-flavor, money-shot driven.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter — macro-leaning composition, warm key + backlight for steam/gloss, multi-ref WITH user-supplied product / dish photo when a branded item is present.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, 5s clips (2-4 total). Slow-motion bias for hero moments (cheese pull, pour, sizzle). generate_audio: false — ASMR layered separately so each sound is intentional.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — OPTIONAL. Many food clips run music + ASMR only. If used: warm, intimate narrator (not Hormozi-energy); single line for hook + one for payoff. Language follows the user's brief.
stackSummary.captions: Optional. MinimalCaptions or KaraokeCaptions for menu / price / dish name. Hormozi-style is wrong here — it fights the warmth and reads as ad-stink.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single track. Cozy lo-fi for café / pastry, energetic modern for fast food, moody jazz for cocktail bar, crisp acoustic for fresh / health. ASMR sound (sizzle, pour, crunch, fizz) sits ABOVE music in the mix.

variationAxes: category (fine dining, fast food, baked goods, coffee/café, cocktail/spirits, smoothie/juice, asian/wok, italian/mediterranean, BBQ, dessert, health/salad, street food)
hero action (cheese pull, sauce pour, steam reveal, sizzle, knife cut, fizz, ingredient cascade, glaze drip, bread tear, latte art, ice clink, flame kiss)
camera (overhead push-in, 45° side macro, slow orbit around plate, locked-off action, hand-eye POV)
duration (4-6s single hero clip, 10-15s café/recipe loop, 15-20s full plating arc)
doNotCopyLiterally: Specific dish, exact prompt, exact garnish, restaurant brand. The vibe is the framework — hook + hero + master template — not any specific recipe.
referenceNotes: Reference REQUIRED for any named restaurant, packaged food brand, or branded beverage (the AGENTS.md hard rule #3 gate refuses without it). Real product photo / logo / packaging must live at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/ before any keyframe is generated. AI-improvised packaging on a branded snack / can / bottle always reads as fake and tanks conversion. For unbranded generic dishes (homemade pasta, salad, cocktail without brand) no reference is needed — but a single user-supplied food photo still tightens styling enormously.
